requirement_topic.en: Conformity Declaration and CR Mark — In-Country Importer and Registration (chung nhan hop quy)
requirement_topic.zh: 合格认证与CR标志——境内进口商及注册（chung nhan hop quy）
requirement_topic.zht: 合格認證與CR標誌——境內進口商及登記（chung nhan hop quy）

summary.en: Vietnam's market-access model for regulated electrical products rests on national technical regulations (QCVN, mandatory) supported by TCVN standards (voluntary), with conformity proven through the CR mark (chung nhan hop quy). For products within an applicable QCVN, a Vietnam-based legal entity (the importer or an authorised in-country representative) must hold the conformity-assessment certificate issued by a STAMEQ-designated certification body, lodge the declaration of conformity with the competent provincial authority, and ensure the CR mark and Vietnamese-language labelling are applied before customs clearance and sale. There is no foreign-manufacturer self-declaration route that bypasses the in-country entity. The importer is responsible for keeping the technical file (test reports, certificate, label artwork) and for goods-labelling under Decree No. 43/2017/ND-CP (origin, importer name and address, technical specifications in Vietnamese). Customs clearance through ports such as Cat Lai / Ho Chi Minh and Hai Phong requires the conformity and labelling documentation to be in order.
summary.zh: 越南对受规管电气产品的市场准入模式以国家技术法规（QCVN，强制）为核心，辅以TCVN标准（自愿），合格性通过CR标志（chung nhan hop quy）证明。对属适用QCVN范围的产品，一家越南本地法人实体（进口商或获授权的境内代表）须持有STAMEQ指定认证机构签发的合格评定证书，向有管辖权的省级主管机关备案合格声明，并确保在清关及销售前加施CR标志及越南语标签。不存在绕开境内实体的境外制造商自我声明途径。进口商负责保存技术文件（检测报告、证书、标签图样），并依第43/2017/ND-CP号议定书进行商品标签（原产地、进口商名称地址、越南语技术规格）。经Cat Lai／胡志明市及海防等口岸清关，须合格及标签文件齐备。
summary.zht: 越南對受規管電氣產品的市場准入模式以國家技術法規（QCVN，強制）為核心，輔以TCVN標準（自願），合格性通過CR標誌（chung nhan hop quy）證明。對屬適用QCVN範圍的產品，一家越南本地法人實體（進口商或獲授權的境內代表）須持有STAMEQ指定認證機構簽發的合格評定證書，向有管轄權的省級主管機關備案合格聲明，並確保在清關及銷售前加施CR標誌及越南語標籤。不存在繞開境內實體的境外製造商自我聲明途徑。進口商負責保存技術文件（檢測報告、證書、標籤圖樣），並依第43/2017/ND-CP號議定書進行商品標籤（原產地、進口商名稱地址、越南語技術規格）。經Cat Lai／胡志明市及海防等口岸清關，須合格及標籤文件齊備。

standards_or_laws: Law No. 68/2006/QH11 on Standards and Technical Regulations + Law No. 05/2007/QH12 on Product and Goods Quality (QCVN/TCVN and CR-mark conformity framework)
Circular No. 28/2012/TT-BKHCN (and amendments) — declaration of standard conformity and declaration of technical-regulation conformity (CR mark procedures)
Decree No. 43/2017/ND-CP — Labelling of goods (Vietnamese-language label, importer details, origin)

summary.en: In China, market access for household refrigerators is via China Compulsory Certification (CCC / 3C): a CCC certificate issued by a designated certification body (such as CQC) based on GB 4706.1, GB 4706.13, GB 4343.1/4343.2 and GB 12021.2 testing plus factory inspection, after which the 3C mark is applied. The Chinese manufacturer or its domestic agent holds the certificate. CCC is a self-contained Chinese national scheme; it does not provide for a Vietnamese importer-of-record, nor is the 3C mark or CCC certificate recognised as the Vietnamese CR conformity. The two systems are parallel national conformity regimes with different bodies, marks and document sets.
summary.zh: 在中国，家用电冰箱的市场准入通过中国强制性产品认证（CCC／3C）：由指定认证机构（如CQC）基于GB 4706.1、GB 4706.13、GB 4343.1/4343.2及GB 12021.2检测加工厂检查签发CCC证书，随后加施3C标志。中国制造商或其境内代理持有证书。CCC为自成体系的中国国家制度；既不设越南进口备案主体，3C标志或CCC证书亦不被承认为越南CR合格。两套系统是平行的国家合格制度，机构、标志及文件各异。
summary.zht: 在中國，家用電冰箱的市場准入通過中國強制性產品認證（CCC／3C）：由指定認證機構（如CQC）基於GB 4706.1、GB 4706.13、GB 4343.1/4343.2及GB 12021.2檢測加工廠檢查簽發CCC證書，隨後加施3C標誌。中國製造商或其境內代理持有證書。CCC為自成體系的中國國家制度；既不設越南進口備案主體，3C標誌或CCC證書亦不被承認為越南CR合格。兩套系統是平行的國家合格制度，機構、標誌及文件各異。

standards_or_laws: China Compulsory Certification (CCC / 3C) — mandatory scheme for household refrigerators, certificate issued by a designated body (e.g. CQC)
CNCA/CCC implementation rules for household and similar electrical appliances

gap.en: Three market-access gaps: (1) In-country entity — Vietnam requires a Vietnam-based importer or authorised representative to hold the conformity certificate and lodge the declaration of conformity; there is no foreign self-declaration route, unlike a manufacturer simply holding a CCC certificate. (2) Separate CR conformity — a CCC certificate / 3C mark is not accepted; the product needs CR-mark conformity from a STAMEQ-designated body, with the Vietnamese declaration of conformity filed with the provincial authority. (3) Vietnamese labelling — Decree 43/2017/ND-CP requires a Vietnamese-language label with importer name and address, origin and technical specifications; the Chinese label/3C mark does not satisfy this. Exporters must appoint or work through a Vietnamese importer, complete CR conformity, and prepare compliant Vietnamese labelling before goods clear customs at Cat Lai / Ho Chi Minh or Hai Phong.
gap.zh: 三项市场准入差距：（1）境内实体——越南要求由越南本地进口商或授权代表持有合格证书并备案合格声明；不存在境外自我声明途径，与制造商单纯持有CCC证书不同。（2）独立CR合格——CCC证书／3C标志不被接受；产品须取得STAMEQ指定机构的CR标志合格，并向省级主管机关备案越南合格声明。（3）越南语标签——第43/2017/ND-CP号议定书要求越南语标签，载明进口商名称地址、原产地及技术规格；中国标签/3C标志不满足此要求。出口商须委任或经由越南进口商办理，完成CR合格，并在货物经Cat Lai／胡志明市或海防清关前备妥合规越南语标签。
gap.zht: 三項市場准入差距：（1）境內實體——越南要求由越南本地進口商或授權代表持有合格證書並備案合格聲明；不存在境外自我聲明途徑，與製造商單純持有CCC證書不同。（2）獨立CR合格——CCC證書／3C標誌不被接受；產品須取得STAMEQ指定機構的CR標誌合格，並向省級主管機關備案越南合格聲明。（3）越南語標籤——第43/2017/ND-CP號議定書要求越南語標籤，載明進口商名稱地址、原產地及技術規格；中國標籤/3C標誌不滿足此要求。出口商須委任或經由越南進口商辦理，完成CR合格，並在貨物經Cat Lai／胡志明市或海防清關前備妥合規越南語標籤。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — CR-mark conformity from a STAMEQ-designated body, a declaration of conformity lodged with the provincial authority, a Vietnam-based importer/representative, and Vietnamese-language labelling per Decree 43/2017/ND-CP are required before customs clearance and sale
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC (3C) certification required before sale in China; certificate held by the manufacturer or its domestic agent

source.publisher: STAMEQ — Directorate for Standards, Metrology and Quality (Ministry of Science and Technology, Vietnam)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Vietnam market access for refrigerators requires a Vietnam-based importer/representative, CR-mark conformity from a STAMEQ-designated body with a filed declaration of conformity, and Vietnamese-language labelling under Decree 43/2017/ND-CP. A Chinese CCC/3C certificate is not recognised. Exporters should line up a Vietnamese importer and the CR conformity workflow before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 越南冰箱市场准入须有越南本地进口商／代表、STAMEQ指定机构的CR标志合格及已备案的合格声明，以及依第43/2017/ND-CP号议定书的越南语标签。中国CCC/3C证书不被承认。出口商应在出货前安排好越南进口商及CR合格流程。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 越南冰箱市場准入須有越南本地進口商／代表、STAMEQ指定機構的CR標誌合格及已備案的合格聲明，以及依第43/2017/ND-CP號議定書的越南語標籤。中國CCC/3C證書不被承認。出口商應在出貨前安排好越南進口商及CR合格流程。

requirement_topic.en: Pre-Import Energy-Label Registration and Customs Clearance Gate (MOIT registration before sale)
requirement_topic.zh: 进口前能效标识注册及清关门槛（MOIT销售前注册）
requirement_topic.zht: 進口前能效標識登記及清關門檻（MOIT銷售前登記）

summary.en: Before household refrigerators can be lawfully sold in Vietnam, the importer must complete MOIT energy-label registration: obtain an energy-efficiency test report from a recognised/designated testing laboratory, register the energy label with MOIT, and receive MOIT acknowledgement, after which the Vietnam Energy Efficiency Label (star rating) is affixed. This energy-labelling step operates alongside the CR-mark electrical-safety conformity and the Vietnamese goods-labelling requirement. In practice this creates a documentary gate at and after customs: the importer should have the energy test report and label registration plus the safety conformity certificate ready, so that products cleared through Cat Lai / Ho Chi Minh or Hai Phong can be placed on the market with valid label and conformity records. Market surveillance under MOIT and STAMEQ checks that on-sale refrigerators carry both a registered energy label and the required conformity mark and Vietnamese labelling.
summary.zh: 家用电冰箱在越南合法销售前，进口商须完成MOIT能效标识注册：取得认可／指定检测实验室出具的能效检测报告，向MOIT注册能效标签并取得确认，随后加施越南能效标签（星级）。该能效标识步骤与CR标志电气安全合格及越南商品标签要求并行。实务上这在清关时及清关后形成文件门槛：进口商应备妥能效检测报告及标签注册，连同安全合格证书，使经Cat Lai／胡志明市或海防清关的产品能以有效标签及合格记录投放市场。MOIT及STAMEQ的市场监管会核查在售冰箱是否同时附有已注册能效标签、所需合格标志及越南语标签。
summary.zht: 家用電冰箱在越南合法銷售前，進口商須完成MOIT能效標識登記：取得認可／指定檢測實驗室出具的能效檢測報告，向MOIT登記能效標籤並取得確認，隨後加施越南能效標籤（星級）。該能效標識步驟與CR標誌電氣安全合格及越南商品標籤要求並行。實務上這在清關時及清關後形成文件門檻：進口商應備妥能效檢測報告及標籤登記，連同安全合格證書，使經Cat Lai／胡志明市或海防清關的產品能以有效標籤及合格記錄投放市場。MOIT及STAMEQ的市場監管會核查在售冰箱是否同時附有已登記能效標籤、所需合格標誌及越南語標籤。

standards_or_laws: MOIT Circular No. 36/2016/TT-BCT (and successors) — energy-label registration procedure (test report, registration, acknowledgement)
Law No. 50/2010/QH12 — Law on Economical and Efficient Use of Energy (mandatory energy labelling/MEPS for refrigerators)
Decree No. 43/2017/ND-CP — Labelling of goods (Vietnamese-language label at import)

summary.en: In China, before sale a household refrigerator needs its CCC certificate (safety/EMC) and the China Energy Label (energy) based on GB 12021.2, with the manufacturer self-declaring the energy grade and registering/filing under the NDRC/SAMR energy-label system. There is no foreign-importer-of-record concept and no Vietnam-style pre-import registration gate tied to a local importer; the Chinese energy-label filing and CCC are domestic processes completed by the manufacturer or its agent. Neither the China Energy Label filing nor CCC substitutes for the Vietnamese MOIT energy-label registration or the importer-held conformity records.
summary.zh: 在中国，家用电冰箱销售前须有CCC证书（安全/EMC）及基于GB 12021.2的中国能效标识（能效），由制造商自我声明能效等级并在NDRC/SAMR能效标识系统下注册／备案。不存在境外进口备案主体的概念，亦无越南式的、与本地进口商挂钩的进口前注册门槛；中国能效标识备案与CCC均为由制造商或其代理完成的境内流程。中国能效标识备案与CCC均不能替代越南MOIT能效标识注册或进口商持有的合格记录。
summary.zht: 在中國，家用電冰箱銷售前須有CCC證書（安全/EMC）及基於GB 12021.2的中國能效標識（能效），由製造商自我聲明能效等級並在NDRC/SAMR能效標識系統下登記／備案。不存在境外進口備案主體的概念，亦無越南式的、與本地進口商掛鈎的進口前登記門檻；中國能效標識備案與CCC均為由製造商或其代理完成的境內流程。中國能效標識備案與CCC均不能替代越南MOIT能效標識登記或進口商持有的合格記錄。

standards_or_laws: China Energy Label system (NDRC/SAMR) — energy-grade filing based on GB 12021.2-2015
China Compulsory Certification (CCC / 3C) — safety/EMC certificate held by the manufacturer or its domestic agent

gap.en: The gap is a Vietnam-specific pre-sale registration sequence that the Chinese domestic processes do not cover: (1) Energy test at a Vietnam-recognised laboratory plus MOIT label registration and acknowledgement must be completed before the refrigerator is placed on the market — the China Energy Label self-declaration is not accepted. (2) The importer of record must hold the energy-label registration, the CR-mark safety conformity, and the Vietnamese-language labelling artwork as a single coherent file presented at/after customs. (3) Timing risk — because energy registration and CR conformity each require Vietnamese testing/assessment, exporters should start the process well before shipment to avoid goods sitting at Cat Lai / Ho Chi Minh or Hai Phong without a registered label or valid conformity, which would block lawful market placement.
gap.zh: 差距在于中国境内流程未涵盖的越南特有的销售前注册次序：（1）在越南认可实验室进行能效检测，并完成MOIT标签注册及确认，须在冰箱投放市场前完成——中国能效标识自我声明不被接受。（2）进口备案主体须持有能效标签注册、CR标志安全合格及越南语标签图样，作为在清关时／后提交的统一完整文件。（3）时间风险——因能效注册与CR合格各需越南检测／评定，出口商应在出货前充分提前启动流程，以免货物滞留Cat Lai／胡志明市或海防而无已注册标签或有效合格，从而阻碍合法投放市场。
gap.zht: 差距在於中國境內流程未涵蓋的越南特有的銷售前登記次序：（1）在越南認可實驗室進行能效檢測，並完成MOIT標籤登記及確認，須在冰箱投放市場前完成——中國能效標識自我聲明不被接受。（2）進口備案主體須持有能效標籤登記、CR標誌安全合格及越南語標籤圖樣，作為在清關時／後提交的統一完整文件。（3）時間風險——因能效登記與CR合格各需越南檢測／評定，出口商應在出貨前充分提前啟動流程，以免貨物滯留Cat Lai／胡志明市或海防而無已登記標籤或有效合格，從而阻礙合法投放市場。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — MOIT energy-label registration (recognised-lab test report + registration + acknowledgement) must be completed before market placement, alongside CR-mark conformity and Vietnamese labelling; held by the Vietnam-based importer
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — China Energy Label filing (GB 12021.2) and CCC required before sale in China; completed domestically by the manufacturer or its agent

source.publisher: Ministry of Industry and Trade of Vietnam (MOIT)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Vietnam imposes a pre-sale energy-label registration sequence (recognised-lab test, MOIT registration and acknowledgement) that the Chinese self-declared energy label does not satisfy. The importer of record should assemble the energy-label registration, the CR-mark conformity, and the Vietnamese labelling as one file and start early so goods are not held at Cat Lai / Ho Chi Minh or Hai Phong without valid registration.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 越南设有销售前能效标识注册次序（认可实验室检测、MOIT注册及确认），中国自我声明能效标识不能满足。进口备案主体应将能效标签注册、CR标志合格及越南语标签整合为一份文件并尽早启动，以免货物在Cat Lai／胡志明市或海防因无有效注册而被滞留。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 越南設有銷售前能效標識登記次序（認可實驗室檢測、MOIT登記及確認），中國自我聲明能效標識不能滿足。進口備案主體應將能效標籤登記、CR標誌合格及越南語標籤整合為一份文件並盡早啟動，以免貨物在Cat Lai／胡志明市或海防因無有效登記而被滯留。
